purpose: Generate item icons for character-described merchandise that is not present in the current item catalog.

itemPromptRules.layout: individual item icons or grid sheets as preferred by the item icon pipeline
itemPromptRules.style: ultra-cartoony magical fantasy game art, collectible trading item icon, readable silhouette

items.prompt: Ultra-cartoony magical fantasy game item icon of sealing wax sticks, collectible readable RPG trading item, isolated object centered with generous padding, pure green #00FF00 background, no text, no label, no border, no UI frame, not realistic, not photorealistic.
items.negativePrompt: no text, no labels, no numbers, no watermark, no border, no frame, no character, no hand, no photorealism, no modern packaging, no busy background
